title: Crude Oil Falls Despite Ongoing Supply Side Issues
section_path: Crude Oil Falls Despite Ongoing Supply Side Issues
section_path_text: Crude Oil Falls Despite Ongoing Supply Side Issues
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Markets were mixed as traders balanced stronger demand in China against the prospects of weaker economic growth in the US. Crude oil edged lower amid concerns that weakness in the US market would offset strong Chinese demand. The large build in inventories over recent weeks has hurt confidence in oil demand, as the Federal Reserve looks to continue raising rates.
